In Python, using the Pillow library, how.question_text: In Python, using the Pillow library, how do you apply a blur filter to an image. What does the variable mean?
In Python, using the Pillow library, how.answer_text:
blurred_img = img.filter(ImageFilter.GaussianBlur(radius=x))
the radius variable determines the intensity of the blur,
lower values mean lower blur intensity, higher means higher intensity
